title: Infant Care Teacher (Ubi)
description:
Summary:

Do you have a passion to care for infants and take pride in their learning journey? Do you enjoy being well supported with programme specialists and support team as you focus on your class? We are looking for passionate infant care educators who will help us realize our vision of giving children the best start in life.


If you have always believed in enriching young learners, and providing childcare services near workplaces, Busy Bees is the place for you.


Description:

As one of our Infant Care Teachers, you will be caring for infants with our infant care programme and routine care responsibilities. You will be in charge of infants under your care to:

1. Plan and implement curriculum and programmes appropriate for the child’s development, including identifying emerging trends to keep innovating. This includes developing initiatives, practices and learning materials to enhance quality of learning environment

2. Build collaborative stakeholder relationships and partnerships, amongst centre staff and families we serve.

3. Manage family and community programmes as we believe in contributing back to the community we are in

4. Conduct routine caregiving and always looking for improvements to deliver better quality and service

5. Uplift professional practice in promoting our vision, mission and values and innovating to deliver high quality service standards


Job Requirements

  • Must have either Higher Certificate in Infant Care of Advanced Certificate in Early Years or other relevant qualification
  • Must be EY1 or EY2 certified

With or without teaching experience; but highly motivated, energetic and passionate about promoting the learning and development of infants and toddlers.

  • Must be proficient in Microsoft Office - Word
  • Good interpersonal and organization skills.
  • Able to work independently and in a team environment.
  • Able to communicate well with internal & external customer.

Depending qualifications and working experience, applicants may be offered roles of different seniority. We have multiple locations and brands across Singapore.

postedCompany.description:
Since opening our first centre in 1989, Small Wonder Preschool has grown to over 50 centres in Southeast Asia and recognised as a leading POP preschool in Singapore. With over 38 locations island-wide, we provide a high-quality, progressive and affordable preschool option for all parents. Our journey towards nurturing confident and competent inquirers continues to grow as we blend the following brands together with our Small Wonder community:


Just Kids Learning Place
(2003 – 2023)

Just Kids Learning Place was opened in 2003 and expanded to a total of 12 centres ever since joining Busy Bees. With a children-first approach, they advocate hands-on learning while also emphasising on their Bilingual curriculum. Joining the Small Wonder family in May 2023, these centres continue to prioritise an enjoyable and enriching learning experience through their enhanced curriculum.


Safari House Preschool
(2008 – 2023)

Based on a proven teaching methodology, Safari House Preschool started in 2008 as the only preschool that offers the Zoo-phonics® curriculum in Singapore. Their curriculum also highlights the importance of Bilingualism, Music and Movement. In January 2023, 13 Safari House centres were rebranded as Small Wonder and are fully POP-certified. We continue to offer the Zoo-phonics® programme at these 13 centres, in harmony with the Small Wonder curriculum.


Canberra Preschool
(2017 – 2023)

Started in 2017, Canberra Preschool is the first in Singapore to integrate Coding and Robotics into their preschool curriculum. Their S.T.E.A.M. curriculum offers a holistic teaching approach (Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, Mathematics), supplemented with essential enrichment programmes (such as Gym, Music and Robotics) which are offered at varying levels based on age. Canberra was integrated with Small Wonder in December 2023 and is the only Small Wonder preschool that offers S.T.E.A.M. as part of their curriculum.


Eager Beaver Schoolhouse
(2000 – 2023)

With its structured and holistic programme, Eager Beaver Schoolhouse started in 2000 with the mission of actively developing each child’s unique educational style. Promoting growth through learning in small groups, children carry out activities in groups of three to four children at a time. After its acquisition by Busy Bees in 2023, these two POP centres were rebranded to Small Wonder and complemented the current curriculum with this interactive framework.


Spring Brainy Kidz
(2008 – 2024)

Founded in 2008, Spring Brainy Kidz distinguishes itself through its unique curriculum, which incorporates Right Brain Training. This innovative approach is designed to enhance several key cognitive skills in children, including attention span, rapid information processing, improved focus, photographic memory, and creativity. In 2024, Spring Brainy Kidz joined the Busy Bees family, a global leader in early childhood education. Following this acquisition, 6 fully POP-certified centres were rebranded into the Small Wonder network in July 2024, bringing the total Small Wonder centres in Singapore to 38.
postedCompany.name: SMALL WONDER PRESCHOOL PTE. LTD.
